mapper.select: SELECT token_id, member_id, refresh_token, user_agent, issued_at, expires_at, last_used_at, is_revoked FROM member_token WHERE member_id = #{memberId} and user_agent = #{userAgent}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO member_token( member_id, refresh_token, user_agent, expires_at ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{refreshToken}, #{userAgent}, #{expiresAt}
)
mapper.update: UPDATE member_token SET refresh_token = #{refreshToken}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, last_used_at = NOW(), is_revoked = false WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND user_agent = #{userAgent}
mapper.select: SELECT token_id, member_id, refresh_token, user_agent, issued_at, expires_at, last_used_at, is_revoked FROM member_token WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken} AND is_revoked = false AND expires_at > NOW()
